justification: RECON-W2B-CAP-P2-RATIFY-1 ratifies Phase 2 closed_ratified on CAP-P2-CLOSE-1 evidence; Phase 0 and Phase 1 remain closed_ratified. No tactical family is unlocked (LOB-W3 remains paused under ADR 0003); the next allowed package class is therefore ratification_only.

transitions.gate: Phase 2 closure evidence (real-capability measurement_session) must be ratified by a later reconciliation package

transitions.blocked_until: all tactical families remain locked at baseline_commit
transitions.gate: per-family unlock review packet that satisfies the preconditions recorded in tactical_unlock_criteria.json
